content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market constructive with Nifty +0.46%, Realty +2.23%, Metal +1.23%, Pharma +0.85%, Energy +0.49% all green. Cap goods/defence theme firing on BHEL/HAL Q4 beats. VIX at 18.33 modest. Late session (14:39, 50 min to close) limits new MIS; CNC entries OK but bias toward managing existing book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.0%, SL already at 1033 (above breakeven 984). CMP 1044.60 — proposed trail to 1033 same as stored. No-op MODIFY would be wasted. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, -2.3% within tolerance. SL 119 (-2.3% from CMP) intact. Gold at record highs supports thesis; macro/geopolitical tailwinds. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, SL 23.85 already above entry 23.65 (locked in profit). Pharma sector constructive, SUNPHARMA/Organon catalyst supportive. Tight SL appropriate; let target 25.20 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong day +4.49%, Q4 PAT +9.4% YoY, FY27 EBITDA guidance Rs 25-26k cr, breaking out above 52w high. CMP 1735.70, current SL 1715 (+0.9% from entry 1700). Trail target up to 1800 to capture extension; SL 1715 stays (1.2% below CMP, 2% trail-gap discipline maintained, no-op on SL itself but target raise justifies MODIFY)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Faded from 1590 high to 1532 (-1.45%). Day-0 holding, P&L -0.5%, SL 1510 still 1.5% below CMP. Board meeting May 14 (binary catalyst ~7 sessions away) — within the 3-session binary rule margin. Thesis (VLCC strong, FY26 results pending) intact. Hold to SL or pre-event reassess."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Faded today from 13976 high to 13535 (-1.8% from entry). SL 13400 (-1% from CMP). Strong Apr sales +33%, but Q4 PAT -6.4% YoY pressuring sentiment. SL 2.9% from entry, risk-budget intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Day-0 holding, P&L -1.4%. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2%, multiple broker upgrades. Faded from 212.66 high to 206.37, but SL 204 (1.1% below CMP) intact. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Day-0 entry at 4575, CMP 4574 (flat). Q4 results today AFTER market hours — binary event tonight. SL 4480 (-2.1% from entry). Position size ~5% of capital, SL distance acceptable for binary event-trade per rule. Hold into print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Day-0 +0.6%, SL 504 (entry 506). Realty leader today, Q4 board meeting May 11 (5 sessions out, just outside binary window). Hold to target 540."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping — already held."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1033 already locks in ~5% gain from entry 984. CMP 1044.60 — SL 1.1% below CMP, well-placed. Day faded from 1057 high to 1044, no need to tighten further into close."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; gold at record, tailwinds intact. SL 119 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry, locking gain. Sector momentum supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Target lifted to 1800 on FY27 guidance and 52w high breakout. SL stays at 1715 (1.2% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-binary (May 14 board) but still 7 sessions out. Will reassess closer to event date per binary-event rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Margin pressure flagged but order book robust. SL intact at 13400."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat thesis intact, intraday fade normal post-spike. SL 204 covers."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results post-market today — event trade. Position breakeven, SL absorbs binary downside. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Realty leader, Q4 board May 11. Tight SL 504 already locking risk."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL — strong Q4 (PAT 2x, dividend) but stock +10.6% intraday and faded from 399 high to 381. Wait for pullback to 360-365 zone before considering swing entry. RRKABEL — broke out +8% on 3x volume to ATH but UltraTech entry into wires/cables is a structural overhang; pass. BAJAJ-AUTO — Q4 + buyback May 6 (binary in 2 sessions); avoid new entry into binary per rule. SUNPHARMA — Organon deal already priced (+7% on news), Q4 May 21; watch for pullback. RELIANCE — Q4 PAT -8.8%, mixed signal; pass. ADANIPOWER — Q4 already out, governance overhang lingers, would stack power-cluster risk; pass. CESC, FEDERALBNK, DLF, MANAPPURAM, CONCORDBIO, LAURUSLABS — no compelling edge over current book at this hour.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed at 47% with diversified exposure: HFC (PNBHOUSING), gold ETF (GOLDBEES), pharma ETF (PHARMABEES), ports/logistics (ADANIPORTS), shipping (GESHIP), auto (MARUTI), private bank (BANDHANBNK), defence (HAL), realty (ANANTRAJ). No cluster overload. Today's performance: realized +3,513, unrealized +3,478. Late session (14:39, 50 min to close), no new MIS; new CNC entries should clear a higher bar than chasing day's gainers post-rally. Discipline this tick: manage existing book, ride winners (PNBHOUSING +6%, ADANIPORTS +1.8%), let stops/targets work. Two binary events on the book (HAL Q4 today post-market, GESHIP May 14, ANANTRAJ May 11) — risk noted, sizing already conservative."
}
